cc:Work.dc:title: Kappa Eta Kappa Seal

cc:Agent.dc:title: Kappa Eta Kappa; Nation Executive Council

cc:Work.dc:description: The seal of the Fraternity shall be the coat-of-arms surrounded by the words "Seal-Organized February 10, 1923" which shall be arranged in a circular configuration.

g.style: font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;font-weight:bold;font-stretch:normal;font-size:144px;line-height:125%;font-family:'Kozuka Gothic Pro B';-inkscape-font-specification:'Kozuka Gothic Pro B Bold';text-align:center;letter-spacing:0px;word-spacing:0px;text-anchor:middle;fill:#ffffff;fill-opacity:1;stroke:none
